raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Deceptive Practices by Routes Car Rental and Citibank 's Failure to Investigate To Whom It May Concern, I am submitting this complaint regarding a transaction I disputed through my credit card issuer, Citibank, involving XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 

The problems I encountered include : Forced Insurance Purchase Although the company clearly states that insurance is optional and accepts personal insurance, I was refused the rental unless I bought their insurance. I had valid coverage, but they still demanded payment. This is coercion and contradicts their written policy.

Vehicle Downgrade ( Bait and Switch ) I reserved and paid for a mid-size XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, but was given a small SUV ( XXXX XXXX  ). When I pointed out the downgrade, I was ignored. This is a clear bait-and-switch.After my strong protest, they reluctantly agreed. 

Pattern of Misconduct Numerous online reviews confirm that this company regularly forces customers to buy insurance and provides smaller vehicles than reserved. 

Theyll swap the car you reserved for a smaller XXXX XXXX ( XXXX weeks ago ) They refuse to give you the car unless you buy optional insurance XXXX XXXX ( 1 month ago ) .These supports my case. 

At the same Airport, Using the same Citi card, I rented a car from XXXX XXXX rent without being forced to buy insurance and I was able to get the car .the same credit card Citibanks Failure to Investigate I disputed the charge, and Citibank twice responded with only the merchants replyno investigation, no accountability, no protection. Their conduct is careless and fails to meet the standard of a responsible card issuer.

This is not a minor billing error ; its a deliberate pattern of abuse by a rental company, and my card issuer is complicit by refusing to take proper action. 

I am requesting the CFPB to : Require Citibank to properly investigate and resolve this dispute Ensure Citibank is held accountable for not protecting consumers Help me recover the unfair charge Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
